calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Requests For Admissions, Truth Of Facts, Admitted And For An Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS' Motion For Order Deeming Requests For Admissions, Truth Of Facts, Admitted And For An Award Of Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

By companion order, the court has granted Five Keys' motion for terminating sanctions. Its motion for an order deeming admitted matters inquired about in its requests for admissions, and for sanctions, is denied as moot.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS' Motion For Terminating Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Five Keys School and Program's unopposed motion for terminating sanctions is granted. Plaintiff Aidan Dietz has not responded to discovery or complied with the court's previous discovery order. It appears to the court that lesser sanctions will not achieve Dietz's compliance with her discovery obligations. The court grants terminating sanctions and dismisses the case..

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Set For Trial On Dec-07-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, And Request For Statement Of Damages, And For An Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS' [SUED HEREIN AS FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAM] Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, And Request For Statement Of Damages, And For An Award Of Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Five Keys Schools and Programs' motion to compel Plaintiff Aidan Elizabeth Dietz to respond to its Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Sets One and Two; and Request for Production of Documents, Set One, is granted.

Dietz failed to timely respond to the above discovery and has thereby waived objections. (CCP 2030.290(a); 2031.300(a).) Dietz is ordered to serve verified responses, without objections, accompanied by documents responsive to the Requests for Production, within 20 days of entry of this order.

Five Keys also seeks sanctions. The relevant discovery statutes require this court to impose sanctions unless the party against whom relief is ordered acted with substantial justification or other circumstances make imposition of sanctions unjust. (CCP 2030.290(c); 2031.300(c).) The court does not find substantial justification but reduces the sanctions amount in view of all the circumstances, including that Dietz's counsel withdrew before discovery responses were provided. The court awards $500 in sanctions, payable by Dietz to Five Keys within 20 days of entry of this order.

Five Keys is ordered to re-serve its written discovery requests on Dietz with service of this order.

Separately, Five Keys seeks an order compelling Dietz to provide a statement of damages. The court grants the request and orders Dietz to provide "a statement setting forth the nature and amount of damages being sought" to Five Keys within 20 days. (See CCP 425.11.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, with a cover letter demonstrating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. =(301/CVA)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. JASON LUNDBERG, Esq. of allegiancelaw (tel: 415-404-6395) for Plaintiff Aidan Dietz.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF AIDAN DIETZ.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants counsel Jason Lundberg's motion to be relieved as counsel.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
